você evolui explorando o mundo procedura:
you evolve by exploring the procedural world, facing enemies by tier, collecting resources,
            opening chests and improving your build with attributes, weapons, equipment and potions.
O progresso mistura combate, exploração,:
Progress mixes combat, exploration, crafting and risk-taking decisions across day/night cycles and weather events,
            directly impacting the rate of farming, survival and XP.

Na prática, isso permite montar sessão c:
In practice, this allows you to set up a cooperative session quickly: create a lobby, invite, enter the world
            and follow shared progression with a focus on exploration, combat, and dynamic events.
